title: Krokia oligantha
taxonomy: Krokia oligantha is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It is a member of the genus Krokia, which is a group of plants commonly known as the cotton bush. The plant is native to parts of the Western Ghats in India. Further classification of the species would require more specific information on its taxonomy. Krokia oligantha is likely to be a member of the order Malvales or a related order within the rosids.
